title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (collaborating with Tel Aviv HQ)
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS trusted by The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones is required.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Head of RevOps role at high-growth B2B SaaS (Finout) aligns perfectly with Omri's 15+ years experience, Salesforce expertise, and GTM scaling background. Tel Aviv HQ collaboration and remote-first structure remove location friction despite NYC office.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and immediately thought of your background scaling revenue operations in high-growth B2B SaaS. Your experience building operational frameworks that drive pipeline forecasting and CAC/LTV optimization at scale seems tailor-made for what the CRO is building—especially with the Tel Aviv HQ collaboration model that plays directly to your location flexibility. Given Finout's trajectory with marquee customers like NYT and Wiz, I'd love to explore whether this hands-on leadership role resonates with your next move.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence platform, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven territory design. Responsibilities include maintaining territory mapping in Salesforce/Fullcast, leading market expansion and capacity modeling, and partnering with Sales and Finance. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Strategy, deep B2B SaaS GTM understanding, and strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools like Tableau or Retool.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive—territory strategy, Salesforce expertise, B2B SaaS GTM, and data-driven pipeline forecasting align perfectly with Omri's core strengths. Only minor gap is the 3-5 year requirement vs. 15+ years experience, but this is actually a strength for growth trajectory.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Gong's RevOps Manager role for Territory Strategy & Operations and immediately thought of you. Your 15+ years driving GTM efficiency through Salesforce, capacity modeling, and pipeline forecasting is exactly what Gong needs to scale seller productivity—especially as they expand market presence. Given your track record building scalable RevOps functions in high-growth B2B SaaS, I'd love to explore whether this next chapter aligns with where you're heading.
